split.random_test_algorithm: Within each label, sort by SHA256('test|20260715|' + row_id) and take the Area 3 count.
split.validation_algorithm: Within each label after test removal, sort by SHA256('val|20260716|' + row_id) and take floor ten percent.

features.limitation: Continuous columns 0 through 9 use statistics from that condition's training partition only.

training.determinism: paired initialization; deterministic algorithms; fixed generator; zero workers

success_checks: Stop before training on hash, shape, split, feature, or contract drift.
Stop on CUDA device mismatch, deterministic failure, OOM, NaN, Inf, privacy finding, or budget ceiling.
Do not fall back to CPU, change batch size or seed, retry, tune, or evaluate test data.

future_full.test_open_policy: Requires Gate 3; no result-driven retry or configuration change.

privacy.public_artifacts: Reviewed minimal code, config, dependency lock, aggregate split and metric summaries, attribution and hashes.
privacy.limitation: No raw data, row lists, checkpoints, per-row outputs, machine identity, accounts, credentials, or absolute paths.
